title: Type

Object Types and Abbreviations Object Type Object Code Icon Project prj Component cpt Entity ent Key key Relationship rel — Field fld Label lbl IncludeScript Library libinc IncludeScript inc Snippet Library libsnp Snippet snp Area are Line lin Header phe Footer pfo Break pbr Applies To All Development Objects Related Links Development Objects Reference Uniface Development Objects are data types that define the characteristics and properties that different application definitions. There are many types of Development Object, but they are all specializations of the basic Uniface Development Object. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
